detail: Phase 8 complete: synth.py (FM, additive, wavetable, subtractive, pulse, unison), 32 tests, 3 examples, 245 total tests
Phase 9 complete: drums.py (kick, snare, hihat, clap, tom, cymbal, 4 drum kits), 23 tests, 2 examples, 268 total tests
Phase 10 complete: modulation.py (LFO 6 shapes, vibrato, filter sweep, param automation), 22 tests, 3 examples, 290 total tests
Phase 11+12 complete: presets.py (20 named presets, SynthPreset) + generative.py (ambient_texture, random_melody, chord progressions). Vibe coding roadmap DONE. 18 modules, 323 tests, 63 examples.
Audit cleanup: hardcoded 44100->SAMPLE_RATE in ex 51/63, 7 README filename fixes, SWOT stale counts, CLAUDE.md test count
